CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2009 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 OSC - TRIAL DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Continued To Jan-13-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-18-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been transferred from Department 212 to place the Settlement Agreement reached by the parties on the record. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Elizabeth Karnazes was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Andje Morovich, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Fleur De Lys.
Marilyn Griffith, CPCU, the Independent Adjuster for Fireman's Fund, was also present.

The agreement of the parties was placed on the record by Ms. Morovich. Pursuant to the terms of said agreement, defendant Fleur De Lys shall pay plaintiff Elizabeth Karnazes the sum of $7,000.00 no later than November 7, 2008. Upon receipt of payment in full, plaintiff Elizabeth Karnazes shall dismiss this matter with prejudice. Plaintiff agrees to accept this sum with the full knowledge that she (plaintiff) will be barred from further claims against defendant. Each party shll bear their own Court costs. Any jury fees deposited with the Clerk shall be refunded. Plaintiff waives her rights under California Civil Code Section 1542. This Settlement is enforceable pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6.

Matter is continued to December 18, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

Stipulation for Settlement of the Entire Action - CCP 664.6. was signed by all parties, and filed by the Clerk.
